title: PacBio (PACB) Q1 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
text: Analysts were expecting PacBio's revenue to grow 7.7% year-on-year in Q1 2024, a reversal from the 4.3% decrease recorded in Q1 2023. The market was anticipating improved earnings momentum coming into Q1 2024. However, as Q1 progressed, PacBio saw an increasing number of customers delay instrument purchases and experienced some unexpected softness in consumable shipments. First quarter revenue ultimately came in below original expectations at $38.8 million, flat versus prior year's $38.9 million. The company issued a preliminary revenue update on April 16, initiating 2024 revenue outlook of $170-200 million. The company lowered its long-term 2026 revenue target guidance, believing it unlikely to achieve its previous guidance of at least $500 million in 2026.
